title: lavandula atlantica
intro: Lavandula atlantica, also known as Spanish lavender, is a subspecies of the lavender plant that is native to the Iberian Peninsula in southwestern Europe. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, antispasmodic, and anti-inflammatory properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Lavandula atlantica include its ability to reduce anxiety and stress, promote relaxation, and improve sleep quality, as well as its potential to alleviate symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes and night sweats. Lavandula atlantica can be used to make herbal preparations, including essential oils, teas, and infusions, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
